# three-flatland

> High-performance 2D sprites, tilemaps, and effects for Three.js -- built for WebGPU with composable TSL shaders.

three-flatland is a library for rendering 2D sprites, animated spritesheets, tilemaps, and post-processing effects in Three.js using TSL (Three Shader Language). Features automatic material-based batching via SpriteGroup, a layer/zIndex render ordering system decoupled from the scene graph, MaterialEffect (per-sprite shader variations) and PassEffect (full-screen post-processing), first-class React Three Fiber support, and optional GPU-accelerated Skia vector graphics. Currently in early alpha.

## Documentation

- [Introduction](https://thejustinwalsh.com/three-flatland/getting-started/introduction/): Overview of three-flatland and its core concepts
- [Installation](https://thejustinwalsh.com/three-flatland/getting-started/installation/): How to install and set up three-flatland
- [Quick Start](https://thejustinwalsh.com/three-flatland/getting-started/quick-start/): Get a sprite on screen in minutes

## Guides

- [Sprites](https://thejustinwalsh.com/three-flatland/guides/sprites/): Sprite2D, textures, frames, anchors, tint, alpha, flip, layer, zIndex
- [Animation](https://thejustinwalsh.com/three-flatland/guides/animation/): AnimatedSprite2D, spritesheet-driven animation, frame events, AnimationController
- [Batch Rendering](https://thejustinwalsh.com/three-flatland/guides/batch-rendering/): Automatic SpriteGroup batching, koota ECS pipeline, instance attributes
- [Flatland](https://thejustinwalsh.com/three-flatland/guides/flatland/): Unified 2D rendering pipeline, batching, post-processing, orthographic camera, render targets
- [Loaders](https://thejustinwalsh.com/three-flatland/guides/loaders/): TextureLoader, SpriteSheetLoader, TexturePacker JSON, pixel-art presets, NearestFilter
- [TSL Nodes](https://thejustinwalsh.com/three-flatland/guides/tsl-nodes/): 100+ composable shader nodes for color, alpha, retro, distortion, vfx, blur, display, analog, upscale
- [Pass Effects](https://thejustinwalsh.com/three-flatland/guides/pass-effects/): createPassEffect, full-screen post-processing, TSL uniforms, schema-driven
- [Tilemaps](https://thejustinwalsh.com/three-flatland/guides/tilemaps/): TileMap2D, TiledLoader, LDtkLoader, animated tiles, TileLayer, Tileset
- [Skia](https://thejustinwalsh.com/three-flatland/guides/skia/): GPU-accelerated 2D vector graphics, shapes, text, gradients, paths, WebGPU/WebGL backends
- [Debug Controls](https://thejustinwalsh.com/three-flatland/guides/debug-controls/): Tweakpane helpers — createPane, usePane, useStatsMonitor, wireSceneStats, GPU timing, Flatland theme

## Examples

- [Basic Sprite](https://thejustinwalsh.com/three-flatland/examples/basic-sprite/): Sprite2D, TextureLoader, minimal Three.js + R3F setup
- [Animation](https://thejustinwalsh.com/three-flatland/examples/animation/): AnimatedSprite2D, spritesheet playback, animation states
- [Batches](https://thejustinwalsh.com/three-flatland/examples/batch-demo/): SpriteGroup batching, thousands of sprites, single draw call
- [TSL Nodes](https://thejustinwalsh.com/three-flatland/examples/tsl-nodes/): MaterialEffect, composable shader nodes, per-sprite parameters
- [Tilemap](https://thejustinwalsh.com/three-flatland/examples/tilemap/): TileMap2D, Tiled/LDtk loader, animated tiles, zoom controls
- [Pass Effects](https://thejustinwalsh.com/three-flatland/examples/pass-effects/): createPassEffect, CRT, bloom, post-processing pipeline
- [Knightmark](https://thejustinwalsh.com/three-flatland/examples/knightmark/): Stress test, sprite benchmark, FPS measurement
- [Skia](https://thejustinwalsh.com/three-flatland/examples/skia/): SkiaCanvas, vector shapes, text, gradients via Skia WASM

## Showcases

- [Breakout](https://thejustinwalsh.com/three-flatland/showcases/breakout/): Complete arcade game, three-flatland + Koota ECS, StackBlitz embed

## Packages

- `three-flatland`: Core -- Sprite2D, AnimatedSprite2D, SpriteGroup, Flatland, MaterialEffect, PassEffect, loaders, TileMap2D
- `three-flatland/react`: R3F subpath -- re-exports core + ThreeElements JSX type augmentation
- `@three-flatland/nodes`: 100+ TSL shader nodes (sprite, color, alpha, retro, distortion, vfx, blur, display, analog, upscale)
- `@three-flatland/skia`: Skia WASM 2D vector graphics, GPU-accelerated, WebGPU/WebGL, Three.js + R3F integration
- `@three-flatland/devtools`: Tweakpane v4 helpers for examples -- createPane, wireSceneStats, usePane, useStatsMonitor, stats row, FPS graph, Flatland theme
- `@three-flatland/presets`: Pre-configured effect combinations (coming soon)

## Optional

- [API Reference](https://thejustinwalsh.com/three-flatland/api/): Auto-generated TypeDoc API documentation
- [LLM Prompts](https://thejustinwalsh.com/three-flatland/llm-prompts/): Copy-paste prompts for AI coding assistants
- [llms-full.txt](https://thejustinwalsh.com/three-flatland/llms-full.txt): Comprehensive API reference for LLMs
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/thejustinwalsh/three-flatland): Source code, issues, and contributions
